title: Brandads 10 AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Aman Resorts × Cillian Murphy — "WABI AMAN" FORMAT: Ultra-Premium Hospitality SMM Poster | 4:5 | Instagram Hero | Behance Front Page Quality CORE STRATEGY: Wabi-sabi tranquility. Natural stone textures, soft-focus landscapes, and minimal margins.CAMPAIGN: "WABI AMAN"MASTER VISUAL: Modern clean AMAN typography (75% canvas) in warm cream. HERO SUBJECT: Cillian Murphy. Charcoal linen resort jacket, calm and serene expression.POSE: Standing on a wooden deck overlooking a Japanese garden, looking off-camera. COLOR SYSTEM: Warm Cream, Charcoal, Bamboo Green, Stone Grey.BACKGROUND: Misty moss-covered stone path and cedar trees of Kyoto, slightly out of focus. GRAPHIC SYSTEM: Thin border frame, location stamp coordinates, minimal layout marks. PROMOTIONAL ELEMENTS: AMAN KYOTO | TRANQUILITY AND MINIMALISM | BY RESERVATIONTYPOGRAPHY: Top center monogram | Center giant A M A N | Title: WABI AMANLIGHTING: Soft diffused daylight filtering through a cedar tree canopy. color palette: pearl white, graphite, mist blue, and silver controls the palette, accents, background, and supporting visual elements. typography: poster title: "THE NEW SIGNAL". CAMERA: ARRI Alexa Mini LF, 75mm Lens, warm cinematic grading, soft depth of field. destination: Riviera Coast. local details: Luxury resort editorial campaign visual direction. travel mood: minimal high-fashion campaign mood.
